title: ollama extension: Gemini 3 thinking models fail with 400 "missing thought_signature" in tool calls
summary:
## Summary

The bundled `ollama` extension at `~/.gsd/agent/extensions/ollama/ollama-chat-provider.js` only handles `<think>...</think>` inline thinking format. It does not propagate Gemini 3's structured `thoughtSignature` field, so the first tool call against any Gemini 3 cloud model returns HTTP

title: [PR] fix(pwa): network-first SW cache to ship UI updates without second-load lag
summary:
## Problem

The service worker in `app/public/sw.js` uses **stale-while-revalidate** for non-document GETs (`return cached || fetched`). This serves stale hashed JS chunks (HomeScreen, RepoLauncherPanel, etc.) on the first visit after a deploy — the new chunks only land in cache for the *next* visit

title: Stale stream timeout does not trigger fallback_providers chain
summary:
### Problem

When the primary provider becomes unresponsive during streaming (no chunks delivered within the stale timeout), Hermes kills the connection and retries with the **same** provider. It does **not** activate the `fallback_providers` chain.

This means that if a provider is alive but unresp

title: [PR] 🔒 Redact hardcoded secrets from version-controlled .env file
summary: 🎯 **What:** A large number of highly sensitive production API keys, tokens, and credentials (including `OLLAMA_CLOUD_API`, OpenAI, Anthropic, GitHub, Cloudflare, Supabase, Azure, etc.) were hardcoded into the version-controlled `.env` file. These have all been replaced with a `<SECRET>` placeholder.
